name: n8n-nodes-concord-crm
description: n8n community node for Concord CRM — full API coverage for Deals, Contacts, Companies, Activities, Notes, Calls, Documents, Products, Pipelines, and more.

scripts.build: tsc && cp nodes/ConcordCrm/concord-crm.svg dist/nodes/ConcordCrm/concord-crm.svg && cp credentials/concord-crm.svg dist/credentials/concord-crm.svg
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run lint -c .eslintrc.prepublish.js nodes credentials
